title: MCal Method, Spel Class
description: Executes machine calibration for robots with incremental encoders.
see_also:
MCalComplete

MotorsOn

MCal Example

VB Example:

If Not m_spel.MCalComplete() Then

  m_spel.MCal()
End If

C# Example:

if (!m_spel.MCalComplete())

  m_spel.MCal();
examples: If Not m_spel.MCalComplete() Then m_spel.MCal()End If
